questions.prompt: A user reports their Linkus is not ringing for inbound calls. You open their extension in PSE and the row shows a grey dot (not registered). What's the next step?
choices: Check the Linkus Clients tab to confirm no devices are registered; if so, send a fresh welcome email so the user can log in again
questions.explanation: Grey = no clients registered. Confirm via the Linkus Clients tab (it shows live device sessions). A fresh welcome email gives the user new QR / login link to re-establish a session. Don't reset the password — that invalidates *existing* clients and doesn't help if there are no clients.

questions.prompt: Resetting an extension's password is a safe routine action when a user reports any login issue.
questions.explanation: Resetting the password invalidates every currently logged-in client for that extension, forcing all of them to re-register from a fresh welcome email. Only do it after confirming the user has actually lost their password — otherwise you've created work for yourself and disrupted their other devices.
